   "reasoning": "I've seen too many audits where the paper trail was clean, but the underlying issues were still there. With 30% of staff turnover in 60 days, we can't afford to throw money at symptoms without ensuring we're meeting compliance regulations. Stricter attendance tracking and public accountability will help us sleep better at night, and documented teacher incentives will keep auditors happy.",
